module: UI controls (controls, console, login, youtube, playlists, misc)

nodes.label: controls.js
nodes.description: Search system: mode tabs, history, result rendering, podcast search, playlist panel toggling, queue panel rendering

nodes.label: updateSearchModeTabs()
nodes.description: Updates DOM for search mode tabs (song/netease/qq/youtube/podcast) active state and placeholders

nodes.label: setSearchMode(mode)
nodes.description: Sets search mode, updates tabs, clears results, triggers search or history

nodes.label: doSearch(q)
nodes.description: Main search function: remembers query, calls platform-specific search APIs, merges QQ/Netease results

nodes.label: mergeSongSearchResults(netData, qqData, q)
nodes.description: Merges Netease and QQ search results, deduplicates on normalized title+artist

nodes.label: renderQueuePanel(reason, opts)
nodes.description: Renders the mini queue panel with song list, current track highlight, like/collect actions

nodes.label: safeRenderQueuePanel(reason, opts)
nodes.description: Safely calls renderQueuePanel with error handling

nodes.label: switchPlaylistTab(tab)
nodes.description: Switches between playlists/podcasts tabs in playlist panel

nodes.label: togglePlaylistPanel(force)
nodes.description: Toggles playlist panel visibility

nodes.label: refreshUserPlaylists(force)
nodes.description: Fetches user playlists from Netease and QQ APIs, merges with local playlists

nodes.label: openPlaylistPanelTab(tab, force)
nodes.description: Opens playlist panel to specific tab, triggers refresh

nodes.label: openProviderLogin(provider)
nodes.description: Opens login modal for specific provider

nodes.label: console.js
nodes.description: Visual FX console: preset grid, sliders, toggles, user FX archives save/load/import/export

nodes.label: presetMeta[]
nodes.description: Array of 7 preset definitions with name, description, icons (emily/滚筒/星球/虚空/唱片/星河/安魂)

nodes.label: renderUserFxArchives()
nodes.description: Renders the user FX archive grid (save/load presets) with rename/export/import capabilities

nodes.label: buildPresetGrid()
nodes.description: Renders preset selection grid cards

nodes.label: bindFxPanel()
nodes.description: Binds all FX panel interactions: sliders, toggles, presets, color pickers, archive buttons

nodes.label: saveUserFxArchive(index)
nodes.description: Saves current FX state to an archive slot

nodes.label: applyUserFxArchive(index)
nodes.description: Applies FX state from an archive slot

nodes.label: setPreset(index, opts)
nodes.description: Sets visual preset, triggers burst animation, saves layout

nodes.label: userFxArchives[]
nodes.description: Array of user-saved FX archive configurations

nodes.label: fx (global)
nodes.description: Global FX state object containing all visual parameters (preset, intensity, depth, etc.)

nodes.label: fxDefaults
nodes.description: Default values for all FX parameters

nodes.label: login.js
nodes.description: Multi-platform login system: Netease/QQ/YouTube login modals, status management, user button, account switching

nodes.label: showLoginModal(opts)
nodes.description: Opens login modal with provider selection (netease/qq)

nodes.label: closeLoginModal()
nodes.description: Closes login modal

nodes.label: setLoginProvider(provider)
nodes.description: Sets active login provider

nodes.label: updateLoginProviderUi()
nodes.description: Updates login modal UI for selected provider

nodes.label: hasAnyPlatformLogin()
nodes.description: Returns true if netease or qq is logged in

nodes.label: hasPlatformLogin(provider)
nodes.description: Checks if specific provider has valid login

nodes.label: hasProviderSvip(provider, status)
nodes.description: Returns true if netease account has SVIP

nodes.label: platformMeta(provider)
nodes.description: Returns metadata for provider (key, short label, full label, app name, dot class)

nodes.label: loginStatus
nodes.description: Netease login status object (loggedIn, nickname, avatar, vipLevel)

nodes.label: qqLoginStatus
nodes.description: QQ login status object

nodes.label: renderUserBtn()
nodes.description: Renders the user button in top bar showing login state

nodes.label: refreshLoginStatus(force)
nodes.description: Fetches netease login status, triggers playlist/discover refresh if logged in

nodes.label: youtube.js
nodes.description: YouTube source toggle, search source enable/disable, YouTube trending loader

nodes.label: loginYouTube()
nodes.description: Opens YouTube login page in new window

nodes.label: searchSourceEnabled(provider)
nodes.description: Checks if search source is enabled in localStorage (youtube defaults OFF)

nodes.label: toggleSearchSource(provider)
nodes.description: Toggles search source on/off, updates toggle buttons

nodes.label: initSearchSourceToggles()
nodes.description: Initializes search source toggle buttons on page load

nodes.label: loadYouTubeTrending()
nodes.description: Loads YouTube trending music into search results

nodes.label: playlists.js
nodes.description: Local playlist CRUD: create/delete/rename, add/remove songs, detail view, play from playlist

nodes.label: createLocalPlaylist(name)
nodes.description: Creates a new local playlist (localStorage), shows modal for naming

nodes.label: showLocalPlaylistDetail(id)
nodes.description: Shows detail panel for a local playlist with song list

nodes.label: hideLocalPlaylistDetail()
nodes.description: Hides local playlist detail panel

nodes.label: getLocalLikedSongs()
nodes.description: Returns all locally liked songs from multiple localStorage keys

nodes.label: renderLocalPlaylistsIntoView()
nodes.description: Renders local playlists list in the playlist panel

nodes.label: loadPlaylistIntoQueueById(id, playNow, name)
nodes.description: Loads a playlist (netease/qq/local/youtube) into the play queue

nodes.label: addSongToLocalPlaylist(playlistId, song)
nodes.description: Adds a song to a local playlist

nodes.label: misc.js
nodes.description: Miscellaneous: idle guide visual, toast notifications, file handling, DIY mode, visual guide

nodes.label: showToast(text, duration)
nodes.description: Shows a toast notification. Cross-file dependency: used everywhere.

nodes.label: closeVisualGuide()
nodes.description: Closes the idle visual guide

nodes.label: idleGuidePointerMove(e)
nodes.description: Handles pointer move for idle guide interaction (rotation, tilt)

nodes.label: handleFiles(files)
nodes.description: Handles imported audio files (drag/drop or file picker) for local playback

nodes.label: applyDiyMode()
nodes.description: Applies DIY mode UI changes to the visual console

nodes.label: openGsapModal(modal)
nodes.description: Opens a modal with GSAP animation (defined in shared/index.html)

nodes.label: closeGsapModal(modal, callback)
nodes.description: Closes a modal with GSAP animation (defined in shared/index.html)
